sentences.arabic: زَارَتِ المَدْرَسَةُ مَتْحَفًا قَرِيبًا مِنَ المَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Škola je posjetila muzej blizu grada.
sentences.translationEn: The school visited a museum near the city.

sentences.arabic: رَأَى الطُّلَّابُ صُوَرًا قَدِيمَةً وَأَشْيَاءَ تَارِيخِيَّةً.
sentences.translation: Učenici su vidjeli stare slike i historijske predmete.
sentences.translationEn: The students saw old pictures and historical objects.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَ بَعْضُهُمُ الدَّلِيلَ عَنْ تَارِيخِ هَذِهِ الأَشْيَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Neki od njih su pitali vodiča o historiji ovih predmeta.
sentences.translationEn: Some of them asked the guide about the history of these objects.
They listened attentively to the guide's explanation.
